headline: Micron Falls as Q2 Earnings and AI Compression Put Memory Stocks on Edge
summary: Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) shares retreated as much as 5% in early Wednesday trading, extending a brutal week that had already seen the stock fall 14% from its recent highs. The immediate catalyst is fiscal Q2 2026 earnings that, while strong on the surface, contained two specific elements rattling investors. The headline numbers were fine. What ...
